name: Madeleine Dean
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $354,947 for Madeleine Dean in U.S. House, PA-04. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
